title: Campaign Health
notes: Per-campaign quality grouped by strategic priority. The full report is a private DM to Kelsey; this tab is its visual companion. First populated run = May 2026 (complete-month vs April), run 2026-06-04. Bi-monthly going forward (15th + 28th, month-to-date). Per-month entry shape: { period, label, verdict, total, groups[], campaigns[], flags[] }. CAVEAT: contacts + HIH are GROSS list-membership counts — a contact in multiple campaign lists is counted in each, so group/total sums are not deduplicated.

months.label: May 2026
months.verdict: May MQLs down ~43% MoM (21 vs 37) — in line with the spring decision-crunch slowdown, not a lead-gen failure. Standing high-intent is strongest in Inquiry Journeys (Navigating Curriculum 44% HIH) and Always-on (MKTG Nurture 64%); Account Driven is now live (478 contacts) but cold (5% HIH, 291 unknown-intent).

campaigns.name: Account Driven
flags: mostly unenriched intent (291 unknown) — cold ABM upload

campaigns.name: Evergreen Social
flags: total<10 — pure organic, minimal list-add expected

campaigns.name: Symposium
flags: 0 contacts — target-list-driven; needs list-membership OR group
Account Driven (10096) now returns 478 contacts — its list membership was added since the April run (previously 0). Intent is mostly unenriched (291 of 478 unknown).
Symposium (10097): 0 contacts — target-list-driven; still needs a list-membership OR group added to its filter.
Below the 10-contact audit threshold: Great First Eight (3), MQL Re-engagement (5), Evergreen Social (1).
Contacts + HIH are gross list-membership counts — a contact in multiple lists is counted in each; group/total figures are not deduplicated.
MQL volume is month-scoped and small across most lists; HIH count + share is the headline quality signal.
